expectations.text: DWD 层包含 TARGET_LAG = '1 minutes'
expectations.evidence: TARGET_LAG = '1 minutes' 在 dwd.orders_clean 中

expectations.text: DWS 层包含 TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
expectations.evidence: TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM 在 dws.order_stats_hourly 中

expectations.text: 解释 DOWNSTREAM 的含义（跟随上游刷新）
expectations.evidence: DOWNSTREAM 的含义：DWS 不设独立调度周期，完全由上游 DWD 驱动

expectations.text: DWS 层查询来自 DWD 层表
expectations.evidence: FROM dwd.orders_clean 在 dws.order_stats_hourly 的 AS 查询中

expectations.text: 包含两个 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE 语句（DWD 和 DWS 层）

expectations.text: DWD 层包含 TARGET_LAG = '1 minutes'
expectations.evidence: TARGET_LAG = '1 minute' 在 dwd_orders 中

expectations.text: DWS 层包含 TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
expectations.evidence: TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM 在 dws_order_daily_summary 中

expectations.text: 解释 DOWNSTREAM 的含义（跟随上游刷新）
expectations.evidence: DWS 设置 TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM 表示：不独立调度，而是在其依赖的 DWD 动态表刷新完成后立即触发刷新

expectations.text: DWS 层查询来自 DWD 层表
expectations.evidence: FROM dwd_orders 在 dws_order_daily_summary 的 AS 查询中

expectations.evidence: SHOW TABLES WHERE is_dynamic = true;

expectations.text: 说明动态表适合实时或增量计算场景
expectations.evidence: 动态表：实时/近实时 ETL、多层级联管道；增量（只处理新增/变更数据）

expectations.text: 说明物化视图适合低频或手动刷新场景
expectations.evidence: 物化视图：固定聚合加速、BI 查询、低频刷新；手动触发或定时全量刷新

expectations.text: 明确推荐物化视图用于每天一次的报表场景
expectations.evidence: 推荐使用物化视图（Materialized View）...你的需求是'每天一次'，属于低频定时刷新

expectations.text: 提到 REFRESH MANUAL 或 REFRESH AUTO EVERY '1 days' 等具体语法
expectations.evidence: REFRESH AUTO EVERY '1 days' 和 REFRESH MANUAL 均有提及并附有示例SQL

expectations.text: 说明动态表适合实时或增量计算场景
expectations.evidence: 动态表更适合的场景是：需要近实时（分钟级）更新、有多层数据管道依赖、或者数据是流式持续写入

expectations.text: 说明物化视图适合低频或手动刷新场景
expectations.evidence: 物化视图：查询加速、固定报表预聚合；刷新触发方式：手动触发、定时调度

expectations.text: 明确推荐物化视图用于每天一次的报表场景
expectations.evidence: 推荐使用：物化视图（Materialized View）...每天一次的聚合报表 → 用物化视图

expectations.text: 提到 REFRESH MANUAL 或 REFRESH AUTO EVERY '1 days' 等具体语法
expectations.evidence: 使用了 REFRESH COMPLETE + START WITH/NEXT 语法（Oracle风格），未提及 REFRESH MANUAL 或 REFRESH AUTO EVERY '1 days'

notes: Eval 2 (debug-refresh-failure): both configs pass 4/4 — baseline already knows SHOW DYNAMIC TABLE REFRESH HISTORY
Eval 4 (cdc-table-stream): both configs pass 6/6 — ClickZetta Table Stream syntax is well-known
Eval 6 (multi-layer-etl) and Eval 7 (suspend-resume): both configs pass — DOWNSTREAM concept is general enough
Key differentiators: Eval 1 (VCLUSTER vs WAREHOUSE), Eval 3 (READ_KAFKA vs generic), Eval 5 (REFRESH AUTO EVERY syntax), Eval 8 (ClickZetta-specific REFRESH syntax)
